scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
